title: BS EN 12811-1:2003 Scaffold Member Design
description: Design scaffolding members as per BS EN 12811-1:2003 & EN 1993-1-1:2005.

d.description: d. Units: mm. Outer Diameter for circular hollow section.

t.description: t. Symbol: t. Units: mm. Wall Thickness of circular hollow section.

manufacturing.description: Manufacturing. Symbol: Manufacturing. Manufacturing type needed for table 6.2 buckling curve selection. Cold Formed more conservative if in doubt.

grade.description: Grade. Symbol: Grade. See Table 3.1 of EN 1993 1-1.

f_y.description: fy. Symbol: f_{y}. Units: MPa. Yield Strength of Member (fy).

f_u.description: fu. Symbol: f_{u}. Units: MPa. Ultimate Strength of Member (fu).

E.description: E. Symbol: E. Units: MPa. Youngs Modulus, defined as 210 GPa in 3.2.6 of EC3.

M.description: M. Symbol: M. Units: kN-m. Unfactored Bending Moment in Member.

V.description: V. Symbol: V. Units: kN. Unfactored Shear Force in Member.

N_t.description: Nt. Symbol: N_{t}. Units: kN. Unfactored Tension Force in Member.

N_c.description: Nc. Symbol: N_{c}. Units: kN. Unfactored Compression Force in Member.

T.description: T. Symbol: T. Units: kN-m. Unfactored Torsion Force in Member.

k_e.description: ke. Symbol: k_{e}. Effective Length Factor for Buckling. Refer to Table 22 in BS 5950-1: 2000 for typical values of ke.

bending_shape.description: Loading. Symbol: Loading. Applied out-of-plane loading type for determination of buckling factors in accordance with Annex B.

bending_moments.description: Moments. Symbol: Moments. Method for inputting moments on beam for determination of cmy in accordance with Annex B. Automatic applies 0 to the member ends and the max bending moment to the mid span of the beam.

M_l.description: Ml. Symbol: M_l. Units: kN-m. Unfactored Bending Moment at left member end.

M_m.description: Mm. Symbol: M_m. Units: kN-m. Unfactored Bending Moment at member mid-span.

M_r.description: Mr. Symbol: M_r. Units: kN-m. Unfactored Bending Moment at right member end.

c_t.description: Coupler Type. Symbol: Coupler. Type of coupler at connection end. Strength based on BS EN 12811-1 standard connections. If custom is selected then manufacturer WLLs can be specified. Select none to skip connection checks.

coupler_standard.description: Connection Class. Symbol: Class. Connection class used to determine strength of connection

F_sk.description: Fs,k. Symbol: F_{s,k}. Units: kN. Characteristic Slipping Force Resistance (See Table C.1 BS EN 12811-1).

F_pk.description: Fp,k. Symbol: F_{p,k}. Units: kN. Characteristic Pull-Apart Force Resistance (See Table C.1 BS EN 12811-1).

M_bk.description: MB,k. Symbol: M_{B,k}. Units: kN-m. Characteristic Cruciform Bending Moment Resistance (See Table C.1 BS EN 12811-1).

M_tk.description: MT,k. Symbol: M_{T,k}. Units: kN-m. Characteristic Rotational Moment Resistance (See Table C.1 BS EN 12811-1).

F_s1.description: Fs,1. Symbol: F_{s,1}. Units: kN. Unfactored Slipping Force Acting at Connection.

F_s2.description: Fs,2. Symbol: F_{s,2}. Units: kN. Unfactored Slipping Force Acting Perpendicular to Connection in Coupled Tube.

F_p.description: Fp. Symbol: F_{p}. Units: kN. Unfactored Pull-Apart Force Acting at Connection.

M_t1.description: MT,1. Symbol: M_{T,1}. Units: kN-m. Unfactored Torsion Moment Acting at Connection in tube.

M_t2.description: MT,2. Symbol: M_{T,2}. Units: kN-m. Unfactored Torsion Moment Acting at Connection in Coupled Tube.

M_b.description: MB. Symbol: M_{B}. Units: kN-m. Unfactored Cruciform Bending Moment Acting at Connection.

uid.description: Calculator unique identifier — must match the endpoint uid.

current_unit_system.description: Unit system for input values and output display.

project_details.description: Optional project metadata for the PDF report header.
